initial_program:
row(R) :- input(R, _, _).
col_in(C0) :- input(_, C0, _).
colCount(N) :- N = #max{C0 : col_in(C0)} + 1.
col(C) :- col_in(C0), C = C0.
col(C) :- col_in(C0), colCount(N), C = N + C0.
output_cell(R, C) :- row(R), col(C).
1 { output(R, C, Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R, C).
output(R, C, Color) :- input(R, C0, Color), C = C0.
output(R, C, Color) :- input(R, C0, Color), colCount(N), C = N + C0.

rounds.program_after:
row(R) :- input(R, _, _).
col_in(C0) :- input(_, C0, _).
colCount(N) :- CMAX = #max{C0 : col_in(C0)}, N = CMAX + 1.
col(C) :- col_in(C0), C = C0.
col(C) :- col_in(C0), colCount(N), C = N + C0.
output_cell(R, C) :- row(R), col(C).
1 { output(R, C, Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R, C).
output(R, C, Color) :- input(R, C0, Color), C = C0.
output(R, C, Color) :- input(R, C0, Color), colCount(N), C = N + C0.
#show output/3.

final_program:
row(R) :- input(R, _, _).
col_in(C0) :- input(_, C0, _).
colCount(N) :- CMAX = #max{C0 : col_in(C0)}, N = CMAX + 1.
col(C) :- col_in(C0), C = C0.
col(C) :- col_in(C0), colCount(N), C = N + C0.
output_cell(R, C) :- row(R), col(C).
1 { output(R, C, Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R, C).
output(R, C, Color) :- input(R, C0, Color), C = C0.
output(R, C, Color) :- input(R, C0, Color), colCount(N), C = N + C0.
#show output/3.
